calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolynne S. Ray (Petitioner) present in pro per with Witness Dana Castellino.
Richard Lawrence Ray (Respondent) present in pro per.
Parties and Witness were placed under oath and testified.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is Grented as follows:
Respondent not to contact the protected person Carolynne S. Ray, either directly or indirectly, in any way, including, but not limited to, in person, by telephone, in writing, by public or private mail, by interoffice mail, by e-mail, by text message, by fax, or by other electronic means.
Take any action to obtain the person's address or location.
Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy The Personal Property Of, Or Disturb The Peace Of The Person.
Stay-away 100 yards from the protected person Carolynne S. Ray and her home.
No Guns or Other Firearms.
Expires: 3 years.
Order signed in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 . Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: H. Harris.
